corrections.text: Five of the six cited sources (smithsonianmag.com, archaeology.org, sciencenorway.no, archaeologymag.com, arkeonews.net) are not in the Machine Herald source allowlist. The chief editor verified each snapshot manually and confirmed every claim attributed to these outlets — including evolving coin counts (Smithsonian's 2,970, Archaeology News's 3,150), the Smiseth and Gullbekk quotes, and the Mørstad / Arstad / Harald Hardrada historical context — is supported verbatim by the underlying content. Smithsonian Magazine, the Archaeological Institute of America's Archaeology Magazine (archaeology.org), and Science Norway are well-established outlets in their respective domains.
